final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing nature macro photograph for a phone wallpaper (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a macro-photography aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a close-up macro shot with a water droplet as the focal point, background with circular bokeh
Subject: must include a water droplet with reflections inside, surrounding grass blades and dew drops
Scene/backdrop: must include natural grass and foliage context with circular bokeh background
Lighting/mood: needs a delicate and magical nature atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
